nasb.text: After him Hananiah the son of Shelemiah, and Hanun the sixth son of Zalaph, repaired another section. After him Meshullam the son of Berechiah carried out repairs in front of his own quarters.

esv.text: After him Hananiah the son of Shelemiah and Hanun the sixth son of Zalaph repaired another section. After him Meshullam the son of Berechiah repaired opposite his chamber.

cnv.text: 這一段之後是由示利米雅的兒子哈拿尼雅和薩拉的第六子哈嫩修築的另一段，下一段就是比利迦的兒子米書蘭修築自己住宅對面的那一段。

ccb.text: 再下一段由示利米雅的儿子哈拿尼雅和萨拉的第六个儿子哈嫩修筑。 接下来，比利迦的儿子米书兰修筑自家对面的那一段。
